chapter_title.en: Chapter on What is Obligatory for One Who Begins with sa’y Before Tawaf or Performs Tawaf and Delays sa’y

parts.text: اَلرَّجُلِ يَطُوفُ بِالْبَيْتِ فَيَدْخُلُ وَقْتُ اَلْعَصْرِ أَ يَسْعَى قَبْلَ أَنْ يُصَلِّيَ أَوْ يُصَلِّي قَبْلَ أَنْ يَسْعَى

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2828 - Rifa'a asked him about a man who is performing Tawaf around the House (Ka'bah) when the time for the Asr prayer begins. Should he perform Sa'y before praying, or should he pray before performing Sa'y?
Imam (as) replied: "There is no harm in praying first and then performing Sa'y."
